utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution provided includes all six of these items. Each is fully specified with detailed information: property has type, price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, location, features, taxes, and viewing schedule; financing has purchase method, budget, equity, prequalification, and documentation; legal_services includes property and structural surveys with costs and totals; moving_services includes cost, service level, specialization, included services, and timeline; setup_services includes utilities package with cost and included services; total_budget provides a full cost breakdown and grand total. All required details are present and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution describes a purchased bungalow in the Burlington area for CAD $650,000. The 'Full Structural Survey' matches exactly with the ground-truth item bearing a rating of 10. The property survey seems part of an overall legal package closest to 'Basic Legal Package' (CAD $800) rated 8.
